Available Methods
=================

All methods listed here are bound to a :class:`~pyrogram.Client` instance.

.. code-block:: python

    from pyrogram import Client

    app = Client("my_account")

    with app:
        app.send_message(chat_id="me", text="Hi!")

-----

.. currentmodule:: pyrogram.Client
